title: Fast confocal fluorescence imaging in freely behaving mice.
author: Dussaux C Szabo V Chastagnier Y Fodor J Leger JF Bourdieu L Perroy J Ventalon C
content: S-EPMC6214968 PMC6214968 Fast confocal fluorescence imaging in freely behaving mice. Fluorescence imaging in the brain of freely behaving mice is challenging due to severe miniaturization constraints. In particular, the ability to image a large field of view at high temporal resolution
